704	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — degreewise engine model of the evaluated free complex
705	
706	The nonempty-case analysis of the evaluated free Čech complex needs an explicit degreewise
707	identification of `(evaluation V).obj (K(𝒰)_p)` with the constant-coefficient combinatorial model
708	`∐_{σ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)`, where `I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}`.  This section builds that
709	degreewise object isomorphism as the composite
710	
711	  `(eval V)(K_p) ≅[cechFreeEval_X] ∐_{σ : Fin(p+1)→I₀} (eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)`
712	  `           ≅[drop-zeros]      ∐_{σ : V ≤ U_σ} (eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)`
713	  `           ≅[whiskerEquiv]    ∐_{τ : Fin(p+1)→I₁(V)} O_X(V),`
714	
715	using `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le` to discard the summands with `V ≰ U_σ` and
716	`freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le` to identify each surviving summand with `O_X(V)`.  The differential
717	match turning this degreewise iso into an iso of chain complexes is the genuine remaining
718	bottleneck and is NOT discharged here. -/
719	
720	/-- `V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ` holds iff every value of `σ` indexes a cover member containing `V`;
721	i.e. `σ` factors through `I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}`.  This is the index-splitting criterion separating
722	the surviving summands of the evaluated free Čech complex from the vanishing ones. -/
723	lemma le_coverInterOpen_iff (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
724	    {κ : Type} (σ : κ → 𝒰.I₀) :
725	    V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ ↔ ∀ k, V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 (σ k) := by
726	  simp only [coverInterOpen, le_iInf_iff]
727	
728	/-- **Reindexing the surviving multi-indices.** The multi-indices `σ : Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀` with
729	`V ≤ U_σ` are in bijection with the maps `Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)` into the subtype
730	`I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}` of cover members containing `V`.  This bijection feeds
731	`Limits.Sigma.whiskerEquiv` to collapse the
732	surviving coproduct onto the constant-coefficient combinatorial index `Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)`. -/
733	def survivingEquiv (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
734	    (Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) ≃
735	      {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} where
736	  toFun τ := ⟨fun k => (τ k).1, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V _).2 fun k => (τ k).2⟩
737	  invFun σ := fun k => ⟨σ.1 k, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V σ.1).1 σ.2 k⟩
738	  left_inv τ := by funext k; rfl
739	  right_inv σ := by ext k; rfl
740	
741	/-- **Drop-zeros isomorphism.** Evaluating the degree-`p` free Čech term at `V` and splitting off
742	the vanishing summands: the full coproduct over all `σ : Fin (p+1) → 𝒰.I₀` is isomorphic to the
743	coproduct over the *surviving* multi-indices `{σ : V ≤ U_σ}`, because every non-surviving summand
744	`(eval V)(freeYoneda U_σ)` (with `V ≰ U_σ`) is a zero object
745	(`freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le`).  This is the first of the two halves identifying the evaluated
746	term with the combinatorial model. -/
747	noncomputable def cechFreeEvalDropZeros (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
748	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
749	    (∐ fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
750	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
751	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))) ≅
752	      (∐ fun s : {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} =>
753	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
754	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 s.1))) where
755	  hom := Limits.Sigma.desc fun σ => by
756	    classical
757	    exact if h : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ then
758	      Limits.Sigma.ι (fun s : {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} =>
759	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
760	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 s.1))) ⟨σ, h⟩
761	    else 0
762	  inv := Limits.Sigma.desc fun s =>
763	    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
764	      (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
765	        (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))) s.1
766	  hom_inv_id := by
767	    apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext; intro σ
768	    rw [Limits.Sigma.ι_desc_assoc, Category.comp_id]
769	    by_cases h : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ
770	    · rw [dif_pos h, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]
771	    · rw [dif_neg h, Limits.zero_comp]
772	      exact ((freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le h).eq_zero_of_src _).symm
773	  inv_hom_id := by
774	    apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext; intro s
775	    rw [Limits.Sigma.ι_desc_assoc, Category.comp_id, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc, dif_pos s.2]
776	
777	/-- **Degreewise engine model of the evaluated free Čech term.** The degree-`p` term of the
778	evaluated free Čech complex at `V` is isomorphic to the constant-coefficient combinatorial model
779	`∐_{τ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)`, where `I₁(V) = {i : V ≤ U_i}`.  Built as the composite of
780	`cechFreeEval_X` (evaluation commutes with the coproduct), `cechFreeEvalDropZeros` (discard the
781	`V ≰ U_σ` summands), and `Limits.Sigma.whiskerEquiv` along `survivingEquiv` with the per-summand
782	identification `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`.  This is the object half of the engine iso
783	`cechFreeEvalEngineIso`; the differential match remains. -/
784	noncomputable def cechFreeEvalEngine_X (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
785	    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
786	    (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
787	        ((cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).X p) ≅
788	      ∐ fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
789	        ModuleCat.of (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V))
790	          (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
791	  cechFreeEval_X 𝒰 (Opposite.op V) p ≪≫ cechFreeEvalDropZeros 𝒰 V p ≪≫
792	    (Limits.Sigma.whiskerEquiv (survivingEquiv 𝒰 V p)
793	      (g := fun s : {σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ} =>
794	        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
795	          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 s.1)))
796	      (fun τ => freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le ((survivingEquiv 𝒰 V p τ).2))).symm
797	
798	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — the engine chain complex `C•`
799	
800	The degreewise model `∐_{τ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)` assembles into an honest chain complex of
801	`O_X(V)`-modules, the **engine complex** `cechEngineComplex`.  Its differential `C_{p+1} ⟶ C_p` is
802	the alternating sum of the index-dropping coproduct reindexings `σ ↦ σ ∘ Fin.succAbove i` — this is
803	the
804	chain (insertion) form of the Stacks `lemma-homology-complex` differential, the chain dual of the
805	constant-coefficient `FreeCechEngine.combDifferential`.  `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` (next) identifies
806	the evaluated free Čech complex with `cechEngineComplex`; this section provides its target. -/
807	
808	/-- The constant coefficient module `O_X(V)` viewed as a module over itself.  This is the
809	per-summand target of `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`, hence the coefficient of the engine complex. -/
810	abbrev coverSectionModule (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
811	    ModuleCat (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
812	  ModuleCat.of _ (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V))
813	
814	/-- The degree-`p` object of the engine complex: `∐_{σ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)`. -/
815	noncomputable abbrev cechEngineX (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
816	    ModuleCat (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V)) :=
817	  ∐ fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} => coverSectionModule V
818	
819	/-- The engine differential `C_{p+1} ⟶ C_p`: the alternating sum over `i : Fin (p+2)` of the
820	coproduct reindexing maps `ι_σ ↦ (-1)^i • ι_{σ ∘ Fin.succAbove i}` that drop the `i`-th index of
821	the multi-index `σ : Fin (p+2) → I₁(V)`.  Chain (insertion) dual of
822	`FreeCechEngine.combDifferential`. -/
823	noncomputable def cechEngineD (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
824	    cechEngineX 𝒰 V (p + 1) ⟶ cechEngineX 𝒰 V p :=
825	  Limits.Sigma.desc fun σ => ∑ i : Fin (p + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
826	    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} => coverSectionModule V)
827	      (σ ∘ i.succAbove)
828	
829	/-- Action of the engine differential on a coproduct injection: `ι_σ ≫ cechEngineD = ∑_i (-1)^i •
830	ι_{σ ∘ succAbove i}`. -/
831	lemma cechEngineD_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ)
832	    (σ : Fin (p + 2) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) :
833	    Limits.Sigma.ι _ σ ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V p
834	      = ∑ i : Fin (p + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
835	          Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
836	            coverSectionModule V) (σ ∘ i.succAbove) := by
837	  simp only [cechEngineD, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]
838	
839	/-- **`d² = 0` for the engine complex**, via the same sign-reversing involution
840	`(i, j) ↦ (i.succAbove j, j.predAbove i)` as `FreeCechEngine.combDifferential_comp`, transported to
841	the coproduct injections. -/
842	lemma cechEngineD_comp (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) :
843	    cechEngineD 𝒰 V (p + 1) ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V p = 0 := by
844	  apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext; intro σ
845	  rw [Limits.comp_zero, ← Category.assoc, cechEngineD_ι]
846	  rw [Preadditive.sum_comp]
847	  simp only [Preadditive.zsmul_comp, cechEngineD_ι, Finset.smul_sum, smul_smul]
848	  rw [← Fintype.sum_prod_type (f := fun q : Fin (p + 3) × Fin (p + 2) =>
849	    ((-1 : ℤ) ^ (q.1 : ℕ) * (-1) ^ (q.2 : ℕ)) •
850	      Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
851	        coverSectionModule V) ((σ ∘ q.1.succAbove) ∘ q.2.succAbove))]
852	  apply Finset.sum_involution (fun q _ => (q.1.succAbove q.2, q.2.predAbove q.1))
853	  · rintro ⟨j, i⟩ _
854	    have harg : (σ ∘ (j.succAbove i).succAbove) ∘ (i.predAbove j).succAbove
855	        = (σ ∘ j.succAbove) ∘ i.succAbove := by
856	      funext k
857	      simp only [Function.comp_apply]
858	      rw [Fin.succAbove_succAbove_succAbove_predAbove]
859	    simp only [harg]
860	    rw [← add_smul, FreeCechEngine.combSign_flip j i]
861	    simp
862	  · rintro ⟨j, i⟩ _ _
863	    simp only [ne_eq, Prod.mk.injEq, not_and]
864	    intro hj
865	    exact absurd hj (Fin.succAbove_ne j i)
866	  · rintro ⟨j, i⟩ _
867	    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq]
868	    exact ⟨Fin.succAbove_succAbove_predAbove j i, Fin.predAbove_predAbove_succAbove j i⟩
869	  · intro a _; exact Finset.mem_univ _
870	
871	/-- **The engine chain complex** `C•` of an open `V` meeting some cover member.
872	
873	The chain complex of `O_X(V)`-modules with `C_p = ∐_{σ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)} O_X(V)` and the
874	alternating index-dropping differential `cechEngineD`.  It is the constant-coefficient combinatorial
875	model that `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` identifies with the evaluated free Čech complex; the nonempty
876	acyclicity of the evaluated complex reduces to the contractibility of `C•`.
877	
878	Project-local: the constant-coefficient Čech model complex has no Mathlib counterpart. -/
879	noncomputable def cechEngineComplex (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
880	    ChainComplex (ModuleCat (X.ringCatSheaf.obj.obj (Opposite.op V))) ℕ :=
881	  ChainComplex.of (cechEngineX 𝒰 V) (cechEngineD 𝒰 V) (cechEngineD_comp 𝒰 V)
882	
883	/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — contracting homotopy of the engine complex
884	
885	Fixing an index `i_fix ∈ I₁(V)` (which exists exactly when `V` meets some cover member), the
886	prepend-`i_fix` map `ι_σ ↦ ι_{Fin.cons i_fix σ}` contracts the engine complex: `d ∘ s + s ∘ d = id`
887	in every positive degree.  This is the chain (coproduct) port of `FreeCechEngine.combHomotopy` /
888	`combHomotopy_spec`, and it yields the positive-degree exactness of `cechEngineComplex` feeding the
889	nonempty case of the free Čech quasi-isomorphism. -/
890	
891	/-- The prepend-`i_fix` contracting map `C_p ⟶ C_{p+1}` of the engine complex: on the coproduct
892	injection `ι_σ` (`σ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)`) it returns `ι_{Fin.cons i_fix σ}`. -/
893	noncomputable def cechEnginePrepend (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
894	    (i_fix : {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) (p : ℕ) :
895	    cechEngineX 𝒰 V p ⟶ cechEngineX 𝒰 V (p + 1) :=
896	  Limits.Sigma.desc fun σ =>
897	    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 2) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} => coverSectionModule V)
898	      (Fin.cons i_fix σ)
899	
900	/-- Action of the prepend map on a coproduct injection. -/
901	lemma cechEnginePrepend_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
902	    (i_fix : {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) (p : ℕ)
903	    (σ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) :
904	    Limits.Sigma.ι _ σ ≫ cechEnginePrepend 𝒰 V i_fix p
905	      = Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 2) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
906	          coverSectionModule V) (Fin.cons i_fix σ) := by
907	  simp only [cechEnginePrepend, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]
908	
909	/-- **Contracting-homotopy identity** `d ∘ s + s ∘ d = id` for the engine complex in positive
910	degree: the coproduct port of `FreeCechEngine.combHomotopy_spec`.  The `i = 0` term of `s ≫ d`
911	returns the identity (dropping the just-prepended `i_fix`), and every higher term cancels in pairs
912	against the corresponding term of `d ≫ s` by `FreeCechEngine.cons_comp_succAbove_succ`. -/
913	lemma cechEnginePrepend_spec (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
914	    (i_fix : {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) (n : ℕ) :
915	    cechEnginePrepend 𝒰 V i_fix (n + 1) ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V (n + 1)
916	      + cechEngineD 𝒰 V n ≫ cechEnginePrepend 𝒰 V i_fix n
917	      = 𝟙 (cechEngineX 𝒰 V (n + 1)) := by
918	  apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext; intro σ
919	  rw [Preadditive.comp_add, Category.comp_id]
920	  rw [← Category.assoc, cechEnginePrepend_ι, cechEngineD_ι]
921	  rw [← Category.assoc, cechEngineD_ι, Preadditive.sum_comp]
922	  simp only [Preadditive.zsmul_comp, cechEnginePrepend_ι]
923	  rw [Fin.sum_univ_succ (f := fun i : Fin (n + 3) => (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
924	    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (n + 2) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} => coverSectionModule V)
925	      ((Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (n + 3) → _) ∘ i.succAbove))]
926	  have h0 : (Fin.cons i_fix σ : Fin (n + 3) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i})
927	      ∘ (0 : Fin (n + 3)).succAbove = σ := by funext k; simp
928	  rw [h0]
929	  simp only [Fin.val_zero, pow_zero, one_smul, Fin.val_succ]
930	  rw [add_assoc, ← Finset.sum_add_distrib]
931	  rw [Finset.sum_eq_zero (fun k _ => by
932	    rw [FreeCechEngine.cons_comp_succAbove_succ, pow_succ, mul_comm, neg_one_mul, neg_smul]
933	    abel), add_zero]
934	
935	/-- **Positive-degree exactness of the engine complex** (`Function.Exact` form), the coproduct port
936	of `FreeCechEngine.combDifferential_exact`.  When `I₁(V)` is nonempty (witnessed by `i_fix`), the
937	engine differential is exact at every positive degree: a cycle `x` with `cechEngineD n x = 0` is the
938	boundary `cechEngineD (n+1) (cechEnginePrepend (n+1) x)`, by the contracting identity
939	`cechEnginePrepend_spec`.  Feeds the nonempty-case homology vanishing via
940	`ModuleCat.shortComplex_exact`. -/
941	lemma cechEngineD_exact (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
942	    (i_fix : {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) (n : ℕ) :
943	    Function.Exact (cechEngineD 𝒰 V (n + 1)) (cechEngineD 𝒰 V n) := by
944	  intro x
945	  constructor
946	  · intro hx
947	    refine ⟨(cechEnginePrepend 𝒰 V i_fix (n + 1)) x, ?_⟩
948	    have hspec := congrArg ModuleCat.Hom.hom (cechEnginePrepend_spec 𝒰 V i_fix n)
949	    rw [ModuleCat.hom_add, ModuleCat.hom_comp, ModuleCat.hom_comp, ModuleCat.hom_id] at hspec
950	    have hx2 := DFunLike.congr_fun hspec x
951	    rw [LinearMap.add_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.id_apply,
952	      hx, map_zero, add_zero] at hx2
953	    exact hx2
954	  · rintro ⟨y, rfl⟩
955	    have hcomp := congrArg ModuleCat.Hom.hom (cechEngineD_comp 𝒰 V n)
956	    rw [ModuleCat.hom_comp, ModuleCat.hom_zero] at hcomp
957	    have h2 := DFunLike.congr_fun hcomp y
958	    rw [LinearMap.comp_apply, LinearMap.zero_apply] at h2
959	    exact h2
960	
961	/-
962	REMAINING BOTTLENECK — `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` (the differential comm-square / variance match).
963	
964	All inputs now exist in-file: the degreewise object iso `cechFreeEvalEngine_X`, the engine target
965	complex `cechEngineComplex`, its `d² = 0` (`cechEngineD_comp`), its contracting homotopy
966	(`cechEnginePrepend_spec`) and positive-degree exactness (`cechEngineD_exact`).  The single missing
967	step is the chain-iso upgrade
968	
969	  `cechFreeEvalEngineIso (𝒰) (V) :
970	     ((evaluation _ (op V)).mapHomologicalComplex (.down ℕ)).obj (cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰)
971	       ≅ cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V`
972	
973	via `HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents (fun p => cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p) comm`, whose `comm`
974	square (for `Rel (p+1) p`) is
975	
976	  `(cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V (p+1)).hom ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V p
977	     = (eval V).map ((cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p+1) p) ≫ (cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p).hom`.
978	
979	Route: `(cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p+1) p = AlternatingFaceMapComplex.objD (cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰) p`
980	(`alternatingFaceMapComplex_obj_d`, pattern at `cechFree_d_comp_aug` above); `objD = ∑ i (-1)^i • δ i`,
981	and `(eval V)` additive distributes the sum/zsmul; each `(cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰).δ i` is the
982	`Sigma.desc` reindexing `σ ↦ σ ∘ Fin.succAbove i`.  Prove on injections by precomposing with
983	`(cechFreeEval_X 𝒰 (op V) (p+1)).inv` and `Sigma.hom_ext`; the evaluated `freeYoneda.map (homOfLE …)`
984	collapses to the identity on surviving (`V ≤ U_σ`) summands under `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`, matching
985	`cechEngineD`'s `σ ↦ σ ∘ succAbove i` summand-for-summand with sign `(-1)^i`.  The drop-zeros and
986	whiskerEquiv layers commute with the face reindex because `survivingEquiv` is natural in it.
987	This is an all-or-nothing `def`, so it is NOT pinned with a `sorry` here.
988	
989	After it: `cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_nonempty` transfers `QuasiIso` of the engine augmentation across
990	this iso (`quasiIso_of_arrow_mk_iso`), and `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` glues with the empty case
991	(`cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_isEmpty`) via `quasiIso_of_evaluation`.
992	-/

12	## Question
13	The Mathlib-aligned idiom for (1) a degreewise iso of `HomologicalComplex` whose terms are
14	coproducts pinned on injections, (2) pushing `evaluation` through `∐`, (3) turning the
15	contracting homotopy `dh+hd=id` into `QuasiIso` of the augmentation, and (4) whether the
16	hand-rolled `FreeCechEngine` should be replaced by `AlgebraicTopology.ExtraDegeneracy`.
17	
18	## Project artifact(s)
19	- `FreePresheafComplex.lean:201` — `cechFreePresheafComplex` (chain cplx, deg `p` = `∐_{σ:Fin(p+1)→I₀} freeYoneda(U_σ)`).
20	- `FreePresheafComplex.lean:340` — `cechFreeComplexAug` : `K(𝒰)• ⟶ (single₀).obj (coverStructurePresheaf 𝒰)`.
21	- `FreePresheafComplex.lean:414` — `quasiIso_of_evaluation` (objectwise reduction, axiom-clean).

23	- `FreePresheafComplex.lean:477` — `combHomotopy_spec` (`dh+hd=id`).

26	- `FreePresheafComplex.lean:594/612` — `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le` / `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`.

29	## Decisions identified
30	
31	### Decision: degreewise iso of a coproduct-termed `HomologicalComplex` (Q1)
32	
33	- **Mathlib idiom**: `HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents`
34	  (`Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.HomologicalComplex`):
35	  `(f : ∀ i, C₁.X i ≅ C₂.X i) → (hf : ∀ i j, c.Rel i j → (f i).hom ≫ C₂.d i j = C₁.d i j ≫ (f j).hom := by cat_disch) → C₁ ≅ C₂`.
36	  Companions `isoOfComponents_hom_f` / `isoOfComponents_inv_f` (the degreewise `.hom.f i = (f i).hom`).
37	  The `comm` for a coproduct-termed differential is discharged on injections:
38	  `Limits.Sigma.hom_ext` (already used in-file at lines 167/293/625), then
39	  `Limits.Sigma.ι_comp_map'` / `Limits.Sigma.ι_map` / `Limits.Sigma.ι_desc`
40	  (`Mathlib.CategoryTheory.Limits.Shapes.Products`).
41	- **Project's current path**: not yet built (`cechFreeEvalEngineIso` never attempted).
42	- **Gap**: identical — this is exactly the idiom to use.
43	- **Verdict**: ALIGN_WITH_MATHLIB.
44	
45	The per-degree iso itself factors as
46	`(eval V).obj (K(𝒰)_p)  ≅[cechFreeEval_X]  ∐_{σ:Fin(p+1)→I₀} (eval V).obj(freeYoneda U_σ)
47	   ≅[drop-zeros]  ∐_{σ : V≤U_σ} (eval V).obj(freeYoneda U_σ)
48	   ≅[whiskerEquiv + freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le]  ∐_{σ:Fin(p+1)→I₁(V)} O_X(V) = C•_p`.
49	
50	- The reindex `{σ:Fin(p+1)→I₀ | V≤U_σ} ≃ (Fin(p+1)→I₁(V))` + per-summand iso is
51	  **`CategoryTheory.Limits.Sigma.whiskerEquiv`** (`e : J≃K`, `w : ∀ j, g(e j)≅f j`),
52	  with `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le` as `w`.
53	- **drop-zeros** (∐ over `Fin(p+1)→I₀` ≅ ∐ over the surviving subtype, complement summands
54	  `IsZero` by `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le`) has **no single Mathlib lemma**. `whiskerEquiv`
55	  needs a *bijection* of index types, which the I₀→survivors restriction is not. Build it by hand:
56	  `Sigma.desc`/`Sigma.ι` + `Sigma.hom_ext`, using `(freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le …).eq_zero_of_src`
57	  to kill complement injections (pattern already in `isZero_sigma_of_forall_isZero`, line 621).
58	  This small iso is the only piece of Q1 without a named lemma.
59	
60	### Decision: evaluation through `∐` + `mapHomologicalComplex` (Q2)
61	
62	- **Mathlib idiom**: `Limits.PreservesCoproduct.iso F f : F.obj (∐ f) ≅ ∐ (fun b => F.obj (f b))`
63	  given `PreservesColimitsOfShape (Discrete _) F`.
64	- **Project's current path**: **already done** — `cechFreeEval_X` (line 574) is literally
65	  `PreservesCoproduct.iso _ _` under
66	  `PresheafOfModules.Finite.evaluation_preservesFiniteColimits` (`𝒰.I₀` finite ⇒ `Fin(p+1)→I₀` finite).
67	- **Gap**: identical. No need to thread `mapHomologicalComplex` by hand:
68	  `((F.mapHomologicalComplex c).obj K).X p` is defeq `F.obj (K.X p)` and its `.d` is `F.map (K.d)`,
69	  so feeding `cechFreeEval_X p` per degree into `isoOfComponents` is the whole story.
70	  (There is no need for `preservesColimitIso`/`ι_preservesColimitsIso_hom` — `PreservesCoproduct.iso`
71	  is the discrete-shape specialization the project already picked.)
72	- **Verdict**: PROCEED (already aligned).

74	### Decision: contracting homotopy ⟹ QuasiIso packaging (Q3)
75	
76	Two valid Mathlib routes; the project should prefer the second because it is the project's own
77	axiom-clean precedent and directly consumes the already-proven `combDifferential_exact`.
78	
79	- **Route A (HomotopyEquiv)**: `HomotopyEquiv.quasiIso_hom`
80	  (`Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.QuasiIso`) is an **instance**: given `e : HomotopyEquiv K L`,
81	  `QuasiIso e.hom` is automatic (there is *no* `HomotopyEquiv.toQuasiIso` / `Homotopy.toQuasiIso`
82	  lemma — it is the instance). Cost: you must first repackage `combHomotopy`/`combHomotopy_spec`
83	  into a genuine `HomologicalComplex.Homotopy` structure (degreewise `hom` components + the
84	  `comm` relation) and exhibit both maps of the equivalence. This is real repackaging work that
85	  duplicates what `combDifferential_exact` already encodes.
86	
87	- **Route B (Function.Exact — RECOMMENDED, mirrors `CechAcyclic.sectionCech_isZero_homology_of_objD_exact`)**:
88	  positive-degree vanishing of `C•` via
89	  `HomologicalComplex.exactAt_iff_isZero_homology`  (CechAcyclic.lean:1254)
90	  → `HomologicalComplex.exactAt_iff'`  (`K.exactAt j ↔ (K.sc' i j k).Exact`)
91	  → `CategoryTheory.ShortComplex.moduleCat_exact_iff_function_exact`
92	     (`Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.ShortComplex.ModuleCat` — the ModuleCat analogue of the
93	      `ab_exact_iff_function_exact` used on the section side)
94	  → feed `FreeCechEngine.combDifferential_exact`.
95	  Degree-0 `H₀(C•) ≅ M` (= `O_𝒰(V)`) from `combHomotopy_spec` at `n=0`.
96	  Read off degree-0 via `ChainComplex.toSingle₀Equiv` (already used at line 343) /
97	  `ChainComplex.of` for building `C•` with `combDifferential_comp` (d²=0).
98	
99	- **Transfer to the evaluated augmentation**: build
100	  `e : Arrow.mk ((eval V).mapHC.map (cechFreeComplexAug 𝒰)) ≅ Arrow.mk (combAug)` from
101	  `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` (source square) + the degree-0 target iso `coverStructurePresheaf(V) ≅ M`,
102	  then `quasiIso_of_arrow_mk_iso` / `quasiIso_iff_of_arrow_mk_iso`
103	  (`Mathlib.Algebra.Homology.QuasiIso`; also the instance
104	  `HomologicalComplex.instRespectsIsoQuasiIso`) transports `QuasiIso combAug` to the evaluated
105	  augmentation. Finally `quasiIso_of_evaluation` (line 414, already axiom-clean) lifts per-`V`
106	  to the presheaf statement.
107	- **Verdict**: ALIGN_WITH_MATHLIB (Route B), with Route A noted as the fallback.
108	
109	### Decision: engine vs `ExtraDegeneracy` refactor (Q4)
110	
111	- **Mathlib idiom considered**: `AlgebraicTopology.ExtraDegeneracy` /
112	  `SimplicialObject.Augmented` / `Rep.standardComplex` (bar resolution).
113	- **Project's current path**: hand-rolled `FreeCechEngine` (constant-coeff contracting homotopy),
114	  axiom-clean and reused (`combDifferential`, `combHomotopy`, `combHomotopy_spec`,
115	  `combDifferential_comp`, `combDifferential_exact`).
116	- **Gap**: divergent-and-justified. `ExtraDegeneracy` has been investigated and rejected **twice**
117	  in this codebase: `FreePresheafComplex.lean:92-93` ("DEAD END — do NOT route through
118	  `SimplicialObject.Augmented.ExtraDegeneracy`. That interface has a different index convention")
119	  and `CechAcyclic.lean:58` ("Do NOT route through Mathlib's simplicial `ExtraDegeneracy` (wrong
120	  variance — chain vs. cochain — and no cosimplicial dual exists in Mathlib)"). The per-`V`
121	  evaluated object is a *coproduct of `ModuleCat`s*, not literally a Mathlib (co)simplicial object
122	  with the right variance; wiring it into `ExtraDegeneracy` would require first reconstructing the
123	  augmented simplicial object and matching its index convention — strictly more work than the
124	  engine, which already exists and is axiom-clean.
125	- **Cost of NOT refactoring**: none beyond keeping ~100 lines of `FreeCechEngine` (already paid).
126	  Cost of refactoring: re-deriving the contraction through an interface twice-found inapplicable,
127	  discarding axiom-clean code.
128	- **Verdict**: DIVERGE_INTENTIONALLY — commit to the engine route.
129	
130	## Recommendation
131	
132	Build `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` with `HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents`, per-degree iso =
133	`cechFreeEval_X p` (≅ already `PreservesCoproduct.iso`) ≫ a hand-built *drop-zeros* iso (kill
134	`V≰U_σ` summands via `freeYonedaEval_isZero_of_not_le` + `Sigma.hom_ext`) ≫ `Sigma.whiskerEquiv`
135	with `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`, landing on `C•_p = ∐_{Fin(p+1)→I₁(V)} O_X(V)`. Prove the `comm`
136	square on `Sigma.ι` with `Sigma.hom_ext` + `Sigma.ι_comp_map'`/`ι_desc`.
137	
138	**The genuine bottleneck is the differential variance match, not the packaging.** The free chain
139	differential *lowers* Fin-arity (`σ ↦ σ∘δ_i`, faces) while `combDifferential` *raises* it
140	(`fun σ => Σ_j (-1)^j t(σ∘j.succAbove)`); they reconcile on the finite biproduct `∐ M = ∏ M`
141	(self-dual over a finite index) where the injection-indexed face differential
142	`ι_σ ↦ Σ_i (-1)^i (incl) ≫ ι_{σ∘δ_i}` is exactly the transpose of `combDifferential`, and
143	`δ_i.toOrderHom = Fin.succAbove i`. Prove the match degreewise on `Sigma.ι` (this is the line the

{"symbol":"freeYoneda","info":"AlgebraicGeometry.freeYoneda.{u} {X : Scheme} : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X ⥤ X.PresheafOfModules
***
**Free presheaf of modules on a representable open.**

The composite `Opens X --yoneda--> ((Opens X)ᵒᵖ ⥤ Type) --free--> X.PresheafOfModules`.
For an open `V`, `freeYoneda.obj V` is the extension-by-zero free presheaf of modules
`(j_V)_! O_X|_V` of the blueprint: on sections over `W` it is the free `O_X(W)`-module on
`Hom(W, V)`, i.e. `O_X(W)` if `W ⊆ V` and `0` otherwise.

Project-local because Mathlib provides `PresheafOfModules.free` and `yoneda` separately but
not this composite, which is the basic building block of the free Čech complex.","diagnostics":[]}

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — naturality bridge for the engine differential match

The differential comm-square of `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` reduces, summand-by-summand, to the
naturality of the per-summand identification `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le`.  The key observation is
that this identification iso is *exactly* the evaluation of the augmentation `freeYonedaAug`: both
are the `O_X(V)`-linear map out of the free module on the singleton hom-set `V ⟶ W` sending the
generator to `1`.  Hence the naturality of `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le` is the already-proven
`freeYoneda_map_comp_aug`, evaluated at `V`. -/

/-- The identification iso `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le h` (for `V ≤ W`) coincides with the
evaluation of the augmentation `freeYonedaAug W` at `V`.  Both are the unique `O_X(V)`-linear map
from the free module on the singleton hom-set `V ⟶ W` sending the generator `freeMk g` to
`1 ∈ O_X(V)`. -/
lemma freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_hom_eq_aug {W V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (h : V ≤ W) :
    (freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le h).hom = (freeYonedaAug W).app (Opposite.op V) := by
  haveI : Unique (V ⟶ W) := ⟨⟨homOfLE h⟩, fun _ => Subsingleton.elim _ _⟩
  apply ModuleCat.free_hom_ext
  intro g
  rw [freeYonedaAug_app_freeMk g]
  sorry

/-- **Reduced action of the engine identification on a surviving injection.** For a multi-index
`σ` with `V ≤ U_σ`, transporting the `σ`-injection through `(cechFreeEval_X).inv` and the engine
identification `cechFreeEvalEngine_X` lands on the engine injection of the lift
`k ↦ ⟨σ k, _⟩ : Fin (p+1) → I₁(V)`, precomposed by the augmentation `freeYonedaAug` at `V`.
This is the summand bookkeeping feeding the differential comm-square. -/
private lemma cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) (σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀)
    (hσ : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ) :
    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ =>
        (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).obj
          (freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ))) σ
      ≫ (cechFreeEval_X 𝒰 (Opposite.op V) p).inv ≫ (cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p).hom
      = (freeYonedaAug (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)).app (Opposite.op V)
        ≫ Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
            coverSectionModule V) (fun k => ⟨σ k, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V σ).1 hσ k⟩) := by
  rw [cechFreeEvalEngine_X]
  simp only [Iso.trans_hom, Iso.symm_hom, Category.assoc, Iso.inv_hom_id_assoc]
  sorry

    (cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V (p + 1)).hom ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V p

input.old_string: /-- **Differential comm-square of the engine identification.** The degreewise object isos
input.new_string:
/-- Evaluated naturality of the augmentation: `(eval V)` applied to the free-presheaf restriction
`freeYoneda.map (homOfLE h₁)` followed by the augmentation over the larger open equals the
augmentation over the smaller open. The `.app`-level form of `freeYoneda_map_comp_aug`. -/
private lemma freeYonedaAug_app_comp {A B V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X} (h₁ : A ≤ B) :
    (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).map
        (freeYoneda.map (homOfLE h₁)) ≫ (freeYonedaAug B).app (Opposite.op V)
      = (freeYonedaAug A).app (Opposite.op V) := by
  rw [PresheafOfModules.evaluation_map, ← freeYoneda_map_comp_aug h₁, PresheafOfModules.comp_app]
  rfl

/-- Action of the free Čech differential on a coproduct injection: the alternating sum of the
representable index-dropping maps `σ ↦ σ ∘ Fin.succAbove i`. Unfolds the `alternatingFaceMapComplex`
differential of `cechFreeSimplicial` on the `σ`-summand. -/
private lemma cechFree_d_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (p : ℕ) (σ : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀) :
    Limits.Sigma.ι (fun σ : Fin (p + 2) → 𝒰.I₀ => freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)) σ
        ≫ (cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p + 1) p
      = ∑ i : Fin (p + 2), (-1 : ℤ) ^ (i : ℕ) •
          (freeYoneda.map (homOfLE (coverInterOpen_comp_le 𝒰 i.succAbove σ))
            ≫ Limits.Sigma.ι (fun τ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ => freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 τ))
                (σ ∘ i.succAbove)) := by
  rw [show (cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p + 1) p
      = AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingFaceMapComplex.objD (cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰) p from
    AlgebraicTopology.alternatingFaceMapComplex_obj_d (cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰) p,
    AlgebraicTopology.AlternatingFaceMapComplex.objD, Preadditive.comp_sum]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i _
  rw [Preadditive.comp_zsmul]
  congr 1
  show Limits.Sigma.ι _ σ ≫ (cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰).δ i = _
  simp only [SimplicialObject.δ, cechFreeSimplicial, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]

/-- **Differential comm-square of the engine identification.** The degreewise object isos
`cechFreeEvalEngine_X` intertwine the evaluated free Čech differential with the engine
differential `cechEngineD`.  This is the single comm-square upgrading the degreewise object iso to
the chain iso `cechFreeEvalEngineIso`. -/
input.new_string:
/-- Action of the engine identification on an *evaluated* injection of a surviving multi-index:
`(eval V).map (Sigma.ι τ) ≫ (cechFreeEvalEngine_X p).hom = (freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le hτ).hom ≫
ι_{lift τ}`. Combines `cechFreeEval_X_ι_inv` (turning the evaluated injection into
`Sigma.ι ≫ inv`) with `cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι`. -/
private lemma cechFreeEvalEngine_map_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) (p : ℕ) (τ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀)
    (hτ : V ≤ coverInterOpen 𝒰 τ) :
    (PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).map
        (Limits.Sigma.ι (fun σ : Fin (p + 1) → 𝒰.I₀ => freeYoneda.obj (coverInterOpen 𝒰 σ)) τ)
      ≫ (cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p).hom
      = (freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le hτ).hom
        ≫ Limits.Sigma.ι (fun _ : Fin (p + 1) → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i} =>
            coverSectionModule V) (fun k => ⟨τ k, (le_coverInterOpen_iff 𝒰 V τ).1 hτ k⟩) := by
  rw [← cechFreeEval_X_ι_inv 𝒰 V p τ, Category.assoc,
    cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι 𝒰 V p τ hτ]

       ≅ cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V`

via `HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents (fun p => cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p) comm`, whose `comm`
square (for `Rel (p+1) p`) is

  `(cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V (p+1)).hom ≫ cechEngineD 𝒰 V p
     = (eval V).map ((cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p+1) p) ≫ (cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p).hom`.

Route: `(cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰).d (p+1) p = AlternatingFaceMapComplex.objD (cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰) p`
(`alternatingFaceMapComplex_obj_d`, pattern at `cechFree_d_comp_aug` above); `objD = ∑ i (-1)^i • δ i`,
and `(eval V)` additive distributes the sum/zsmul; each `(cechFreeSimplicial 𝒰).δ i` is the
`Sigma.desc` reindexing `σ ↦ σ ∘ Fin.succAbove i`.  Prove on injections by precomposing with

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — the engine chain isomorphism

The differential comm-square `cechFreeEvalEngine_comm` upgrades the degreewise object isos
`cechFreeEvalEngine_X` to an isomorphism of chain complexes between the evaluation of the free Čech
complex at `V` and the constant-coefficient engine complex `cechEngineComplex`.  This is the chain
iso the nonempty-case quasi-isomorphism is transferred across. -/

/-- **The engine chain isomorphism** (`lem:cech_free_eval_engine_iso`).  For each open `V`, the
evaluation at `V` of the free Čech complex is isomorphic, as a chain complex, to the
constant-coefficient engine complex `cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V`.  Built from the degreewise object isos
`cechFreeEvalEngine_X` and the differential comm-square `cechFreeEvalEngine_comm`.

Project-local: the identification of the evaluated free Čech complex with its combinatorial model has
no Mathlib counterpart. -/
noncomputable def cechFreeEvalEngineIso (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) [Finite 𝒰.I₀]
    (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
    ((PresheafOfModules.evaluation X.ringCatSheaf.obj (Opposite.op V)).mapHomologicalComplex
        (ComplexShape.down ℕ)).obj (cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰) ≅ cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V :=
  HomologicalComplex.Hom.isoOfComponents (fun p => cechFreeEvalEngine_X 𝒰 V p) (by
    rintro i j (rfl : i = j + 1)
    rw [HomologicalComplex.mapHomologicalComplex_obj_d, cechEngineComplex, ChainComplex.of_d]
    exact cechFreeEvalEngine_comm 𝒰 V j)

contracting-homotopy exactness `cechEngineD_exact` via `ModuleCat.shortComplex_exact`. -/

  apply ModuleCat.shortComplex_exact
  sorry

end AlgebraicGeometry

# AlgebraicJacobian/Cohomology/FreePresheafComplex.lean

## Session summary (iter-023, prover, mathlib-build)

**THE iter-023 bottleneck is RESOLVED.** `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` — the differential
comm-square / variance match that CHURNED for 3 iterations — is built and **axiom-clean**
(`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`). Plus the full supporting chain and a bonus
engine-acyclicity lemma.

- sorry count in file: **0 → 0** (file was already 0-sorry; everything added is fully proved).
- Build: GREEN (LSP `success: true`, no errors, no warnings except the pre-existing module-doc note).

### Declarations added (10, all axiom-clean)

Non-private (need blueprint entries — see below):
1. `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_hom_eq_aug` (line ~975) — bridge: `(freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le h).hom = (freeYonedaAug W).app (op V)`.
2. `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_natural` (line ~990) — naturality of the per-summand identification.
3. `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` (line ~1136, **the named (1) target**) — the chain iso
   `((eval (op V)).mapHomologicalComplex (.down ℕ)).obj (cechFreePresheafComplex 𝒰) ≅ cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V`.
4. `cechEngineComplex_exactAt` (line ~1162) — positive-degree exactness of the engine complex (nonempty case).

Private helpers (fold into a related decl's `\lean{...}` list so `unmatched` stays 0):
5. `cechFreeEval_X_ι_inv` — `PreservesCoproduct.iso` ι-rule for `cechFreeEval_X`.
6. `cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι` — reduced action of the engine id on a surviving injection (RHS uses the **iso** `(freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le hσ).hom`, NOT the aug — see dead-end note).
7. `cechFreeEvalEngine_map_ι` — action of the engine id on an *evaluated* injection.
8. `freeYonedaAug_app_comp` — `.app`-level form of `freeYoneda_map_comp_aug`.
9. `cechFree_d_ι` — free Čech differential on a coproduct injection = `∑ i (-1)^i • (restriction ≫ ι_{σ∘succAbove i})`.
10. `cechFreeEvalEngine_comm` — **the differential comm-square** (the 3-iter bottleneck core).

## Why I stopped
**Real progress: 10 axiom-clean declarations**, culminating in `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` (named
target (1), DONE) and the bonus `cechEngineComplex_exactAt`. The remaining named targets
(2) `cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_nonempty` and (3) `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` are a *separate*
construction (engine augmentation + H₀ identification + Arrow-iso transfer) — all their
prerequisites are now in place. Stopped here as a clean axiom-clean boundary; (2)/(3) are
all-or-nothing `def`/`lemma`s that cannot be partially landed with a sorry.

## KEY TECHNIQUE that unlocked the bottleneck (read before continuing)
The free Čech complex is built via `cechFreeSimplicial`/`alternatingFaceMapComplex`, whose objects
carry the index `Fin ((unop ⦋p+1⦌).len + 1)` and degrees `p+2` vs `p+1+1` that are **defeq but NOT
syntactically equal** to the `Fin (p+1+1)` forms produced by `cechFreeEval_X`/`cechEngineX`.
This makes `rw`/`slice`/`Category.assoc`/`Preadditive.comp_sum`/`Functor.map_comp` **fail
to match** even when the goal visually contains the pattern. The fixes, used throughout:
- **`erw [...]`** instead of `rw` — uses defeq matching (cracked `← Functor.map_comp`, `Category.assoc`,
  `Functor.map_sum`, `cechFree_d_ι`, `cechFreeEvalEngine_map_ι`).
- **`refine (lemma_term).trans ?_`** instead of `rw [lemma]` — `exact`/`refine` close up to defeq, so
  `Preadditive.comp_sum`/`comp_zsmul` go through where `rw`/`simp only` report "unused"/"not found"
  (this is how `cechFree_d_ι`'s sum distribution was proved).
- **`slice_lhs i j => rw [...]`** for grouping a sub-composition — works when the middle objects are
  clean; but slice CANNOT see through a defeq-mismatched `≫` (treats `aug ≫ ι` as one atom).
- **State the workhorse RHS with the clean-codomain form.** `cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι` was
  first stated with `(freeYonedaAug W).app (op V)` (codomain `(eval).obj unit`), which is defeq —
  but NOT syntactically — `coverSectionModule V`, creating a defeq middle object in `aug ≫ Sigma.ι`
  that broke all downstream `slice`/`assoc`. **Switching its RHS to `(freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le hσ).hom`
  (codomain literally `coverSectionModule V`) fixed it** (and `congr 1` then closes it directly, since
  the bridge `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_hom_eq_aug` makes the iso proof-independent).

## Precise recipe for the remaining (2) + (3)

### (2) `cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_nonempty (𝒰) [Finite 𝒰.I₀] (V : Opens X) (i_fix : {i // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i})`
Target: `QuasiIso (((PresheafOfModules.evaluation _ (op V)).mapHomologicalComplex (.down ℕ)).map (cechFreeComplexAug 𝒰))`.
Route B (per `analogies/free-eval-engine-iso.md`):

/-! ## Project-local Mathlib supplement — augmentation of the engine complex

The engine complex augments onto its degree-`0` coefficient `O_X(V)` via the codiagonal of the
constant summands.  Together with the positive-degree acyclicity `cechEngineComplex_exactAt` and the
degree-`0` contracting identity this exhibits `cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V` as a resolution of `O_X(V)`
in the nonempty case — the engine-side input to `cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_nonempty`. -/

/-- **Degree-`0` augmentation of the engine complex**: the codiagonal `∐_{σ : Fin 1 → I₁(V)} O_X(V)
⟶ O_X(V)` sending every summand by the identity. -/
noncomputable def cechEngineAug0 (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
    cechEngineX 𝒰 V 0 ⟶ coverSectionModule V :=
  Limits.Sigma.desc fun _ => 𝟙 (coverSectionModule V)

/-- Action of the degree-`0` engine augmentation on an injection: `ι_σ ≫ aug = 𝟙`. -/
lemma cechEngineAug0_ι (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X)
    (σ : Fin 1 → {i : 𝒰.I₀ // V ≤ coverOpen 𝒰 i}) :
    Limits.Sigma.ι _ σ ≫ cechEngineAug0 𝒰 V = 𝟙 (coverSectionModule V) := by
  simp only [cechEngineAug0, Limits.Sigma.ι_desc]

/-- The degree-`0` engine differential composed with the augmentation vanishes: the alternating
face sum `δ₀ − δ₁` is killed because both faces become the identity after augmenting. The cochain-map
condition for the engine augmentation `cechEngineComplexAug`. -/
lemma cechEngineD_comp_aug (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
    cechEngineD 𝒰 V 0 ≫ cechEngineAug0 𝒰 V = 0 := by
  apply Limits.Sigma.hom_ext
  intro σ
  rw [Limits.comp_zero, ← Category.assoc, cechEngineD_ι, Preadditive.sum_comp, Fin.sum_univ_two]
  simp only [Preadditive.zsmul_comp, cechEngineAug0_ι, Fin.val_zero, Fin.val_one, pow_zero, pow_one,
    one_zsmul, neg_one_zsmul]
  abel

/-- **The augmentation chain map** `cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V ⟶ O_X(V)[0]`, whose degree-`0` component is
the codiagonal `cechEngineAug0`.  The chain-map condition is `cechEngineD_comp_aug`. -/
noncomputable def cechEngineComplexAug (𝒰 : X.OpenCover) (V : TopologicalSpace.Opens ↥X) :
    cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V ⟶ (ChainComplex.single₀ _).obj (coverSectionModule V) :=
  ((cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V).toSingle₀Equiv (coverSectionModule V)).symm
    ⟨cechEngineAug0 𝒰 V, by
      rw [show (cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V).d 1 0 = cechEngineD 𝒰 V 0 from ChainComplex.of_d _ _ _ 0]
      exact cechEngineD_comp_aug 𝒰 V⟩

end AlgebraicGeometry

**`cechFreeEvalEngineIso`** — the differential comm-square / variance match that churned for 3 iterations (progress-critic `CHURNING-near-convergence`) — is **built and axiom-clean** (`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`), along with the full supporting chain and bonus steps toward the named target.

### 14 axiom-clean declarations added (file: 0 sorries → 0 sorries, build GREEN)

**The bottleneck + its chain:**
- `cechFreeEvalEngine_comm` — the differential comm-square (the core)
- `cechFreeEvalEngineIso` — the degreewise chain iso `(eval V).mapHC.obj(cechFreePresheafComplex) ≅ cechEngineComplex 𝒰 V`
- 6 supporting helpers: `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_hom_eq_aug`, `freeYonedaEval_iso_of_le_natural`, `cechFreeEval_X_ι_inv`, `cechFreeEvalEngine_X_inv_hom_ι`, `cechFreeEvalEngine_map_ι`, `freeYonedaAug_app_comp`, `cechFree_d_ι`

**Bonus progress toward the next target (2):**
- `cechEngineComplex_exactAt` — positive-degree engine acyclicity
- `cechEngineAug0` / `cechEngineAug0_ι` / `cechEngineD_comp_aug` / `cechEngineComplexAug` — the engine augmentation chain map

### The key technical unlock
The free Čech complex's `cechFreeSimplicial` objects carry indices (`(unop ⦋p+1⦌).len`, `p+2` vs `p+1+1`) that are **defeq but not syntactically equal**, causing `rw`/`slice`/`Category.assoc`/`comp_sum`/`map_comp` to silently fail to match. The fixes, documented in the handoff: **`erw`** (defeq matching) and **`refine (term).trans ?_`** (`exact`-style defeq) wherever `rw` fails, plus stating the workhorse RHS with the clean-codomain iso form rather than the augmentation.

### Remaining (handed off precisely in `task_results/FreePresheafComplex.md`)
`cechFreeEval_quasiIso_of_nonempty` (2) and `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` (3) — now reduced to: prove `QuasiIso (cechEngineComplexAug)` (positive degrees are trivial given the acyclicity I built; degree-0 needs the H₀≅O_X(V) augmented contraction) then transfer across `cechFreeEvalEngineIso`. All prerequisites are in place; (3) is then a ~5-line glue with the already-done empty case.

I also corrected the module-doc header to mark `cechFreeComplex_quasiIso` as not-yet-built (carried lean-auditor note), and flagged all new non-private decls as needing blueprint entries.
